an4.130:0.3: Incredible Things About the Wheel-Turning Monarch
an4.130:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, there are these four astounding and amazing things about a wheel-turning monarch. What four?
an4.130:2.2: (1) "If an assembly of khattiyas comes to see a wheel-turning monarch, they are elated when they see him. If the wheel-turning monarch speaks to them, they are also elated by his speech, and that assembly of khattiyas is still unsated when the wheel-turning monarch falls silent.
an4.130:2.3: (2) "If an assembly of brahmins comes to see a wheel-turning monarch, they are elated when they see him. If the wheel-turning monarch speaks to them, they are also elated by his speech, and that assembly of brahmins is still unsated when the wheel-turning monarch falls silent.
an4.130:2.4: (3) "If an assembly of householders comes to see a wheel-turning monarch, they are elated when they see him. If the wheel-turning monarch speaks to them, they are also elated by his speech, and that assembly of householders is still unsated when the wheel-turning monarch falls silent.
an4.130:2.5: (4) "If an assembly of ascetics comes to see a wheel-turning monarch, they are elated when they see him. If the wheelturning monarch speaks to them, they are also elated by his speech, and that assembly of ascetics is still unsated when the wheel-turning monarch falls silent.
an4.130:2.6: "These, bhikkhus, are the four astounding and amazing things about a wheel-turning monarch.
an4.130:3.2:
5
"So too, bhikkhus, there are these four astounding and amazing things about Ānanda. What four? "If an assembly of bhikkhus comes to see Ānanda, they are elated when they see him. If Ānanda speaks to them on the Dhamma, they are also elated by his speech, and that assembly of bhikkhus is still unsated when Ānanda falls silent.
an4.130:3.3:
6
(2) "If an assembly of bhikkhunīs … male lay followers … female lay followers comes to see Ānanda, they are elated when they see him. If Ānanda speaks to them on the Dhamma, they are also elated by his speech, and that assembly of female lay followers is still unsated when Ānanda falls silent.
an4.130:4.2: "These, bhikkhus, are the four astounding and amazing things about Ānanda."
